meta.note: canon kernel: binary wall bonus, escalade -1, stores-then-starve, R3 sea resupply, R2 Bombard-only vs Theodosian. Bombard scenarios assume game round >= siege.greatBombard.availableFromRound.

directAssaultIntactTheodosian.description: single battles: N professionals assault intact Theodosian walls (escalade -1, defender +4), garrisons per column
